requirement_description: Select a dataset only after scientific, metadata, access, and overlap evidence is reviewed
required_evidence: Authoritative IDs; human scRNA-seq verification; cohort scope; patient counts; access; overlap review; explicit human role decision
notes: No dataset selected; selected_datasets remains empty

requirement_description: Verify patient-level SLE and healthy-control label provenance
required_evidence: Exact source fields; observed values; definitions; patient/sample linkage; class counts; source location
notes: Labels must not be inferred from title, tissue, ontology, or study context

requirement_description: Verify stable patient or donor grouping and sample relationships
required_evidence: Exact ID fields; sample linkage; repeated/timepoint structure; uniqueness; missingness; cross-source overlap evidence
notes: Cell barcodes and row order are not patient identifiers

requirement_description: Prepare a leakage-safe patient, donor, or cohort split manifest
required_evidence: Populated versioned split manifest; patient-level class counts; repeated-sample grouping; audit status
notes: Cannot populate before dataset, IDs, and labels are verified

requirement_description: Demonstrate that the approved split passes all leakage checks
required_evidence: Patient/donor/sample/cell overlap results; cohort deduplication; batch and label confounding review; training-only transformations
notes: Mock leakage tests are not evidence about real data

requirement_description: Determine whether a candidate cohort is scientifically suitable for restricted baseline training
required_evidence: Approved role; patient and class counts; tissue/assay fit; treatment/batch metadata; access; missingness; dimensionality review
notes: No patient-count threshold or training role is assumed

required_evidence: Approved file inventory; sample/patient QC summaries; threshold decisions; before/after counts; exclusion log; named approver
notes: QC scaffold exists but no real QC decision is approved

requirement_description: Prepare an audited patient-level pseudobulk or composition feature manifest
required_evidence: Populated manifest; finalized normalization/filtering/annotation policies; training-only transformations; provenance and exclusion reports
notes: Current feature manifests contain headers only
